mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workshop WHERE active = true AND status='정상'

SELECT w.workshop_id, p.program_id, p.title, p.description, p.price, p.category, p.active, p.approved, p.thumb FROM workshop w JOIN program p USING (workshop_id) WHERE w.workshop_id = #{workshopId} AND w.owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workshop (owner_id, name, description,profile_img, address, contact_number) VALUES ( #{ownerId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{profileImg}, #{address}, #{contactNumber})
mapper.update: UPDATE workshop SET description = #{description}, contact_number = #{contactNumber}, status = #{status}, created_at = NOW() WHERE workshop_id = #{workshopId} AND owner_id = #{ownerId}
mapper.select: SELECT w.workshop_id, w.owner_id, w.name, w.description, w.profile_img, w.address, w.contact_number, w.status, w.approved, w.active, w.created_at, u.user_id, u.name AS user_name, u.email FROM workshop w LEFT JOIN user u ON w.owner_id = u.user_id WHERE workshop_id = #{workshopId}

SELECT w.workshop_id, w.name, w.approved, a.reason, a.created_at AS logCreatedAt FROM workshop w JOIN action_log a ON w.workshop_id = a.target_id AND a.target_type = 'WORKSHOP' WHERE w.approved = '거절' AND w.workshop_id = #{workshopId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
